title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
summary: Ball, went so far as to argue that the US government should find a pretext to create regulatory fear, uncertainty, and distrust around the new models, since open-weight models must necessarily deter capital spending by the frontier labs.
caption: output/2026-07-20/openai-is-scared-of-open-weight-models-should-the-us-be.txt
